description_long: This is a hand-held, octagonal mirror with a dark, aged reflective surface and a decorative, ornate backing. The frame appears to be made of a tarnished brass or bronze metal, giving it an antique look. The handle is short, cylindrical, and tapers slightly, likely crafted from wood with a polished, dark finish. The back of the mirror features an intricate, embossed floral or sunburst pattern, adding to its vintage aesthetic. The reflective surface is dark and shows signs of wear, suggesting it is an older or decorative piece rather than a modern, highly functional mirror. The overall design is reminiscent of Victorian or early 20th-century hand mirrors, suitable for decorative or personal grooming use.
description: Antique hand-held octagonal mirror with a dark, aged reflective surface, ornate metal frame, and decorative embossed backing.
description_view_0: Front view shows the dark, worn reflective surface within an octagonal metal frame and the wooden handle.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thin profile of the mirror and the tapering handle, with the frame's metallic edge visible.
description_view_2: Back view displays the ornate, embossed floral or sunburst pattern on the rear of the mirror, framed by the same metal.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, highlighting the slimness of the mirror and the handle's shape.
attribute_frame_design: Octagonal, antique-style brass or bronze frame with ornate embossed floral or sunburst pattern on the back; dark wood handle.
attribute_placement_location: entryway, bedroom, vintage shop, or decorative display in an urban setting
